Comment.MultiLanguageText: True if retentive data are lost
True if date and time are lost

LineComment.Text: Comment/Function: Executes one time when the operating mode of the CPU changes from STOP to RUN
Version | Date | Expert in charge | Changes applied
Msg 700512 "SAFETY : THE BRAKE TEST IS NOT WORKING, PLEASE RESET"
Msg 700441 "Machine stop process completed. Turn off the machine using the main switch"
Msg 700442 "The machine stop process has started..."
Msg 700420 "Timeout shutdown. Please turn off manually"
Msg 700421 "The laser is still on. Please turn it off manually"
Msg 700422 "Laser status unknown. Turn it off on left PC then wait for the machine's shutdown"
Msg 700423 "Power failure. The machine stop process has started…"
